List Operations
snippets.code:
numbers = [1, 2, 3, 4, 5]
print('Original:', numbers)
print('Sum:', sum(numbers))
print('Average:', sum(numbers) / len(numbers))
print('Squares:', [x**2 for x in numbers])

snippets.title: File I/O
snippets.code:
with open('example.txt', 'w', encoding='utf-8') as f:
    f.write('Hello, File!')

with open('example.txt', 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
    print('File content:', f.read())

snippets.title: Pandas Basics
snippets.code:
import pandas as pd

df = pd.DataFrame({'Name': ['A', 'B'], 'Marks': [85, 92]})
print(df)
print('Average:', df['Marks'].mean())
